Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: the typical sequence starts with creating a purchase requisition then it gets approved After approval a purchase order is issued to the vendor The next steps usually involve the vendor sending an invoice which the company matches with the PO three way match and then payment is released Finally the goods are received before or around the time of invoice processing

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Starting with Case 1001 The activities are in order Create PR Approve PR Issue PO Receive Goods Vendor Invoice Received Match Invoice to PO Release Payment Close Case That looks pretty standard The order seems correct The invoice is received after the goods which makes sense Matching happens after invoice receipt which is correct Payment is released after matching So 1001 seems normal

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1002 Lets list the activities here Create PR then immediately Issue PO without any approval

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: You should create the PR get it approved then issue the PO So Case 1002 skips the Approve step before issuing the PO

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Then on 2024 02 03 they receive the invoice release payment then later approve the PR receive goods match invoice to PO and close Thats out of order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Also releasing payment before receiving the goods and matching the invoice would be a big issue Without approval and matching the payment could be invalid or fraudulent Then after payment they receive goods which is backward The goods should be received before payment Also the approval happens after the payment which is definitely a problem

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This case has multiple issues missing approval before PO releasing payment before matching and receipt and receiving goods after payment Those steps are out of the standard sequence

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1003 Activities are Create PR Approve PR Issue PO then Release Payment Then later they receive the Vendor Invoice Receive Goods Match Invoice to PO and Close

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So here payment is released before receiving the invoice and the goods Thats a problem because you shouldnt pay the vendor before receiving the goods or the invoice Also matching happens after payment which is incorrect The standard process is to receive the invoice match it with PO and goods receipt then release payment

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So this is an anomaly Payment released too early leading to potential issues like paying for goods not received or incorrect invoices

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1004 Create PR Approve PR then Receive Goods before even issuing the PO Then after receiving goods they issue the PO

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the PO comes after goods receipt Thats a major issue You cant receive goods before placing the order

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The vendor sends goods without a PO which could lead to confusion unordered items or payment disputes

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Then after issuing the PO they receive the invoice match it to PO release payment So steps here are out of order Receiving goods before PO is a big no no Also the three way match PO goods receipt invoice might not be properly done because the PO wasnt issued until after goods were received

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the anomalies are in Cases 1002 1003 and 1004 Each has different issues Case 1002 skips approval before PO releases payment early and receives goods after payment Case 1003 releases payment before receiving the invoice and goods Case 1004 receives goods before issuing the PO All of these could lead to financial risks compliance issues or process inefficiencies
